title: AI Search SEO Deep Dive
summary: Live testing of how AI Overviews and LLM citations interact with structured JSON-LD data. What's working, what's not, and where to focus effort.
description: A deep dive into AI search behavior with real test sites. We look at how Google's AI Overviews cite sources, what structured data signals actually matter for LLM inclusion, and how to build content that gets referenced rather than replaced.
